page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m8.4xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores with 16 vCPUs, utilizing Intel Xeon processors running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The instance is configured with 1 thread per core, meaning hyperthreading is disabled. It is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core.

This instance does not include any local storage, requiring external block storage solutions for data persistence. It lacks dedicated GPU hardware, making it unsuitable for hardware-accelerated graphics or parallel computing workloads. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 10 Gbps. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are included with this configuration.

The high memory density of 8.0 GB per core positions this instance as a memory-optimized resource. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing capabilities without resource contention. This hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive workloads such as in-memory databases, caching layers, enterprise applications, and data processing tasks that require substantial RAM relative to compute capacity.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m8.4xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual server instance built on the KVM hypervisor and powered by an Intel Xeon x86_64 processor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores and 16 vCPUs running at 2.7 GHz, with a single thread per core configuration. The instance is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on external storage solutions and network-based resources. Networking capabilities include a baseline bandwidth of 10 Gbps. This resource density makes the instance suitable for memory-intensive applications, including in-memory databases, caching systems, and enterprise middleware requiring dedicated compute resources and substantial memory capacity without the need for local NVMe storage or graphics acceleration.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m8.4xlarge is a memory-optimized KVM instance with 16 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, 10 Gbps network bandwidth, and no local storage or GPU accelerators.
